workflows.title: Initial local onboarding
steps: Create the administrator from the user menu.
Register at least one PIN.
Register at least one fingerprint.
Validate both credentials immediately.

workflows.title: Smart Life QR pairing
steps: Open Smart Life and add a device from Camera&Lock.
Choose the observed Wi-Fi video lock family.
Select the target Wi-Fi network and enter the password.
Show the generated phone QR to the lock camera.
Wait for the lock prompt and confirm success in the app.

workflows.title: Wi-Fi or EZ Mode fallback pairing
steps: Open the lock Wi-Fi onboarding family.
Enter the Wi-Fi details.
Enter the reset-device flow.
Switch the app to EZ Mode.
Follow the alternative distribution or hotspot prompts.

workflows.title: Remote unlock response
steps: Receive the ring or unlock request in the app.
Review the visitor context.
Use the unlock control if access is approved.
Review the related event in the logs if needed.

workflows.title: Member management
preconditions: user code generated during lock onboarding
steps: Enter the member management section.
Add a named member.
Open the member detail view.
Assign the unlock mode and bind the user code.

workflows.title: Temporary password generation
preconditions: temporary-password feature exposed by the commercial build
steps: Enter the temporary-password function in the app.
Choose a one-time or unlimited password type.
Generate the credential and distribute it according to the access policy.
Treat any additional temporary-password modes as unvalidated until the build is confirmed.
